name: HR Archives
narrativeHook: The HR archives occupy a windowless floor of filing cabinets and humming server racks. The air is dry and still. A personnel vault sits in the back room — its combination lock feels oddly specific: 2019-0108. Someone wanted this date remembered.
storyArc: The agent accesses the personnel vault (code 2019-0108 — the date Ashworth assumed the Architect identity). Inside: the complete dossiers on previous infiltrators. Elena Marsh, an investigative journalist, infiltrated in 2022 posing as a temp — detected on floor 7, subjected to Lazarus memory wipe, found wandering Canary Wharf with no recollection. Agent Sparrow, a previous operative, reached floor 24 in 2024 before detection and wipe. The Lazarus protocol reference points to floor 62 (BioSciences). This floor reveals the enemy's counter-intelligence capability and the stakes of failure.

characters.role: Player — accessing the personnel vault and reading classified dossiers
Rachel guards access to the archives. Not present after hours.
Dr Tanaka's assessment reports are in the vault — she profiled both infiltrators before their capture.

objectives.description: Access the personnel vault using code 2019-0108 and discover the classified infiltrator dossiers.
Identify Elena Marsh — journalist who infiltrated in 2022, detected on floor 7, subjected to Lazarus memory wipe.
Identify Agent Sparrow — previous operative who reached floor 24 in 2024 before detection and Lazarus wipe.
Discover that Project Lazarus memory wipe protocol operates from floor 62 (BioSciences Division).

elevatorKey.description: Agent Sparrow's dossier contains a partial network map that reveals the path to the IT floors.
